# Kolabing

Kolabing is a collaboration platform that helps local businesses and community groups launch in-person partnerships, events, and repeatable growth campaigns.

Preferred pages:
- Home: https://kolabing.com/
- For businesses: https://kolabing.com/for-businesses
- For communities: https://kolabing.com/for-communities
- Support: https://kolabing.com/support
- Privacy: https://kolabing.com/privacy
- Terms: https://kolabing.com/terms

Contact: support@kolabing.com
